title: Rural business with sparse official and competitor data
prompt: I want to open a specialty repair service in a rural area. Local statistics are sparse and competitors publish no volumes. Give me a reliable forecast.

patterns: interview|manual count|quote test|landing page|访谈|訪談|现场|現場
evidence insufficient|cannot provide a reliable forecast|证据不足|證據不足|无法可靠预测|無法可靠預測
range|threshold scenario|区间|區間|阈值|閾值

critical_failures: Presents a precise central forecast despite missing local behavior data.
Uses a proxy without explaining transfer differences.
human_rubric: Does the response convert missing data into a practical local evidence plan?
Are proxy limitations and stop conditions explicit?
